It's so cold right now.

legality of it but yeah

And... yeah.

Anyways, I'm gonna do that.

And then I'm probably gonna

And yeah...

like the level 1
classes, but I got to

so my actual study time

so I just told them that.
Like 3 months.

Because I don't want them to
overestimate my Korean level.

Anyways, I'm gonna go to

Okay anyways,
